slides.title: 5 to 30 *reps*
slides.body: Muscle grows across a huge rep range.

slides.title: Train near *failure*
slides.body: Reps only count when they get hard.

slides.title: Live in *6 to 12*
slides.body: A solid middle ground for most lifts.

slides.title: Go *heavy* too
slides.body: Low reps build the strength that drives growth.

slides.title: High reps *work*
slides.body: 20+ reps grow muscle when taken to failure.

slides.title: Pick your *reps*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training and protein dialed.
